settings.feature_content:
Authentic vintage Realtree AP camo print
Natural wear and original fade — not distressed artificially
Vintage construction: single-stitch sleeves, period-correct hem
Original Realtree tag intact at interior collar
One piece. When it's gone, it's gone.
Ships within 24–48 hours. All orders over $150 ship free. Final sale — all pieces are unique and cannot be restocked.
All sales are final. Each piece is one-of-one. Please review measurements carefully before purchasing.

settings.title: Official Replica Jerseys
settings.text: Every jersey manufactured by authentic brand, the same brands that kit out the world's greatest national teams.

settings.title: Fast Worldwide Shipping
settings.text: We ship to football fans everywhere. Wherever you are in the world, your jersey is on its way.

settings.title: Secure & Safe Checkout
settings.text: Shop with complete confidence. Every transaction is protected with industry standard encryption.

settings.title: Built by Fans, For Fans
settings.text: Every product we carry is chosen by people who actually care about the beautiful game.

settings.title: Packed With Care
settings.text: Every jersey is inspected, folded, and packed to arrive in perfect condition. Ready to wear straight out of the box.

settings.heading: Why IntlFans?
settings.story: IntlFans was built by football fans who were tired of overpaying for jerseys that took weeks to arrive. We wanted one place — built for international football fans — where you could find your nation's colors, trust the quality, and get it fast. From Buenos Aires to Berlin, football is the one language the entire world speaks.

settings.heading: The atmosphere hits different when you're wearing the right colors

settings.quote: Absolutely love my Messi jersey. Arrived fast, quality is amazing and looks exactly like the real thing. Will be ordering again before the World Cup!
settings.author: Carlos M., Argentina

settings.quote: Ordered the Brazil kit for my son. He was over the moon. Great quality, fast shipping and the colors are spot on. IntlFans never disappoints.
settings.author: James T., England

settings.quote: CR7's Portugal jersey is incredible. Exactly what I wanted. Shipped to Spain in days. Perfect quality and fit. Highly recommend IntlFans.
settings.author: Sofia R., Spain
